name: Apache HTTP Server RCE
description: Remote code execution vulnerability in Apache HTTP Server allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary code

name: OpenSSL Weak Cipher
description: OpenSSL configured with weak cipher suites allowing potential decryption of traffic
solution: Update OpenSSL configuration to remove weak ciphers

name: MySQL Privilege Escalation
description: MySQL server allows authenticated users to escalate privileges

name: SSH Weak Key Exchange
description: SSH server allows weak key exchange algorithms
solution: Update sshd_config to disable weak algorithms

name: PHP Information Disclosure
description: PHP configuration exposes sensitive information in error messages
